must_do.full_text:
Goodbye @AnthropicAI.

All comma dollars go towards the mission and our values. Our dollars come from customers buying hardware they own. And we spend them on GPUs and engineers to write MIT-licensed software.
must_do.summary: comma_ai宣布停止使用Anthropic服务，转向自主开发。强调资金用于GPU和工程师，开发MIT许可软件，体现独立自主的技术路线。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：明确的决裂宣言
反常识：AI公司主动弃用头部大模型
angles: AI公司决裂大模型：comma_ai为何弃用Anthropic
自主还是对抗？揭秘开源硬件公司的独立之路
MIT许可+自研GPU：comma_ai的技术独立宣言

must_do.full_text:
Today we release Antidoom, an open-source method that removes a common failure mode in reasoning models: the doom loop.

Doom-loop rates before and after, with eval scores up across the board:

> Early LFM2.5-2.6B checkpoint: 10.2% → 1.4%

> Qwen3.5-4B: 22.9% → 1% (greedy https://t.co/axO6l7LIu7
must_do.summary: 开源项目Antidoom发布，解决推理模型的「死亡循环」失败模式。在多个模型上显著降低失败率：LFM2.5从10.2%降至1.4%，Qwen3.5从22.9%降至1%。
angles: Antidoom开源：推理模型死亡循环终被破解
失败率暴跌90%：AI推理的关键突破
开源方案拯救推理模型：从22.9%到1%的逆转

Now many of those same users have hit their usage limits and can't use Fable anymore.

If you're going to make an

must_do.full_text:
Un repo para buscar trabajo con Claude Code.

Lo clonas, rellenas tu perfil y la IA evalúa ofertas, adapta tu CV, escribe cartas y te prepara entrevistas.

Automatiza tu búsqueda de trabajo:
→ https://t.co/LkOuGYXbYd https://t.co/t9VT8fzfqT

media.ext_alt_text: Captura del README de GitHub del proyecto “ai-job-search”, con el título “AI Job Search” y una descripción de un framework que usa Claude Code para evaluar ofertas, adaptar el CV, escribir cartas de presentación y preparar entrevistas. Arriba aparece un pequeño icono pixelado naranja con maletín, listo para buscar trabajo sin actualizar LinkedIn a mano.

must_do.summary: 开源repo利用Claude Code自动化求职流程：克隆项目、填充个人信息，AI自动评估职位、优化简历、撰写求职信、模拟面试。

must_do.full_text:
I can finally talk about 5.6.

I’ve been testing it for months and, without exaggeration, it’s the best model I’ve ever used.
Fast, smart, genuinely creative, and you guessed it, they finally fixed front-end design.

I haven’t needed to check the code I’ve written in two months.
must_do.summary: 开发者分享对某AI模型5.6版本的评测，称其速度快、创意强、前端设计改进，两月无需检查代码。具体产品名称未明确。
angles: 终于修复前端设计，开发者用5.6版本两月无需检查代码
AI模型5.6深度评测：速度、创意、设计全面升级
开发者实测：这个AI模型让我停止检查代码

Anthropic cannot afford to remove it.

This is starting to look like a
must_do.summary: 用户推测Anthropic不会从订阅中移除Fable 5，因为GPT 5.6即将发布，移除会导致用户流失。这是对AI产品竞争格局的分析。

priority.full_text:
The Argentina come back against Egypt is one of the best matches in football history.

I analyzed ~50,000 games with Fable to show just how crazy it was.

Of the 10,138 times that a team has been up 2-0 at 79', only SIXTEEN times (0.16%) did they ever make a come back at the end https://t.co/ccd6UC1Qv9
priority.summary: 用户用Fable分析5万场足球比赛，发现阿根廷2:0领先79分钟后逆转埃及的概率仅0.16%。展示AI数据分析在体育领域的应用。
angles: AI分析体育数据：0.16%的奇迹逆转
Fable深度分析5万场比赛，揭秘足球概率
